cards.title: Event flow
cards.body: Platform workflows may need booking created, booking updated, booking cancelled, payment status, or inquiry status events.

cards.title: Reporting use
cards.body: Attribution data should help hotels and Partners understand booking value, quality, cancellation behavior, and repeat potential.

items.question: What is Partner attribution?
items.answer: Partner attribution connects a booking or inquiry back to the Partner, campaign, card, link, or platform path that created the demand.

items.question: Why use webhooks?
items.answer: Webhooks can keep approved platform workflows updated when booking or reporting events change.

items.question: Are event payloads published?
items.answer: Detailed event payloads should be added after API material is approved.

fields.heading: Ready to build with Wink?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
